title: eragrostis glutinosa
intro: Eragrostis glutinosa, also known as Devil's Needle or Black Needle Grass, is a species of grass native to Australia, known for its sharp, needle-like leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Eragrostis glutinosa are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Eragrostis glutinosa can be prepared in herbal teas or infusions, and sometimes used in tinctures or salves, but it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal treatment.
